Map dot-key projection, inc/dec expressions, tailrec callable kind, regex literals, and automatic heterogeneous-List Union inference are absent from current Deeplus. No Stable, Preview, or nonactivatable feature row restores them. Current replacements are explicit indexing/API calls, explicit assignment, ordinary recursion, library construction from String/Bytes, and an explicit expected List union.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Range literal refinement type. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Range step expression surface clarification. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.
Current trace-bounded responsibility for Raw Pointer Provenance Phase A. No authority, ownership, effect, witness, or source activation is implied beyond the exact current references.

The only current raw String surface is raw"...". The scanner interprets neither escapes nor interpolation, preserves the exact body in CST, lowers to StringLiteral(raw=true) and then MIR ConstString, and invokes no provider or authority.
Current-only four-plane type contract with closed descriptor variants and semantic validation.
ReadonlyView<T> is nonowning and nonmutating, cannot outlive or survive move/drop of its owner, and may not cross suspension/task/actor/isolation boundaries without an explicit shareability proof.
Each mutation copies the package, alters one semantic invariant, executes the verifier, and requires the intended check ID to fail.
